findings.title: axe found 8 violation groups

principles.summary: Basic metadata/viewport probes passed; Lighthouse not run in this scale batch.

html lang='en'; deeper locale flows not tested.

verdict: Homepage batch: 5 principles with issues; top concerns: high be-fast-and-stable: CLS above good threshold (0.19); high be-inclusive: axe found 8 violation groups; medium be-private-and-secure: Large third-party/network surface.
_caveats: Scale batch: no Lighthouse, LCP or INP in this pass; coordinator CDP data should fill objective metrics.
Memory is a single heap snapshot, not a repeated-interaction leak proof.
Dark-mode/reduced-motion are inferred from probes unless separately captured.
